sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT, name VARCHAR(100));
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, name) VALUES (1, 'hello world');
UPDATE test_strings SET name = INITCAP(name) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, INITCAP(name) AS capitalized_name FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, CONCAT(INITCAP(name), ' is updated') AS updated_name FROM test_strings;
